title: Crypto Trading Made Super Easy!
thesis_bullets: So if you're like me and absolutely love spending time with your crypto bros on Telegram, but absolutely hate all of the garbage you get from non-verified world trades from influencers, which just keep losing money time after time.
Well, I may have a solution for you today in the form of a Telegram bot.
So if that sounds good to you, let's get straight to it.
Hey, traders, I hope you're going extremely well.
My name's David and welcome to my weekly segment on banter where I go through proven and profitable trading strategies.
Today, we're going to be talking about Telegram bots and I've got a really exciting announcement to share with you.
Now, like I said earlier, I've been a user of Telegram for absolutely years and I use many of these bots for my daily trading on Telegram.
They make things so, so much easier, allowing us to enter into DeFi without having to have heavy apps on our computer and allows us to make easy trades on the go.
We can do loads of special things like verifying transactions.
We can copy other traders thanks to some copy trading functions.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on weekly.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on weekly: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
